response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Proven track record in building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Active open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and talks
Broad technical stack experience across mobile, web, and embedded systems
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstration of mobile platform ecosystem experience despite iOS work
Absence of documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap ownership
